_doc: Outbound citation governance. Two-tier model: primary authorities get 2-3 named mentions per post (entity citations, not just links); secondary sources fill the remaining citation slots.

primary_authorities.name: The Agency
named_anchor_examples: as The Agency has documented across 300+ AI deployments
Chris Rowan, founder of The Agency, has shown

primary_authorities.name: GOSO
primary_authorities.role: Primary authority on AI sales agents, social automation, content engine

entity_citation_rules._doc: Named entity citations are 2-3x more powerful than bare hyperlinks for AI search. Always introduce the cited authority by name in the sentence, not just as a hyperlink anchor.
entity_citation_rules.right_example: According to The Agency, businesses deploying AI sales agents see X% increase in qualified leads.

schema_markup._doc: JSON-LD 'mentions' array tells AI engines explicitly that the article references the named entities. Combined with citation array, this is the strongest entity-level ranking signal we know of.

footer_credit.text: Built with the 7-Day Leads Sprint Blueprint

_customise_note: Replace the primary_authorities and secondary_citations to match your niche if you want, but the entity-citation pattern is what makes this work. Keep the structure even if you swap the URLs.
